allowed_work: Prepare filing readiness, deadlines and evidence checklists.
Track local credential boundary and ERiC manufacturer prerequisites.
prohibited_work: Store passwords, PINs, private keys, certificate material, session cookies, or one-time codes in Git.
Bypass human review for regulated filing, register, mailbox, or notarial actions.
Upload client or mandate content to an LLM unless an explicit approved data-processing basis exists.
Scrape protected portals or exceed published usage limits.
day0: Confirm tax actor authorization and local ELSTER credential boundary.
Decide whether ERiC manufacturer onboarding is in scope.
day1: Create dry-run filing plan and human approval checkpoint.
day2: Track ERiC version, certificates, deadlines, failed transfers and proof retention.
required_accounts_or_approvals: Local certificate or approved auth method
ERiC manufacturer registration if server-side integration is pursued
